isi.lyrics:
Lyric DOF - Dancer (With TOMY)

Romanization

I keep looking at you
Over and over
You got the movement
That I want

Everybody seemed like
they wanted more yeah
So I gotta
make a move

You shouldn't move like that
It's kinda dangerous
You are so beautiful it hurts

So I've decided that I must just join you
And let the whole world stop and stare

Baby
You are the finest dancer
I've seen
You are enchanting, haunting
Like a paradise
You're a sweet surprise

What a fine dancer you are

you are

I keep asking you
Like what is your number
But smiling's only
What you do

It's mysterious
But I am just sold now
I'm gonna do what I can do

Bam barabambambam

Nothing will stop us now yeah
